barb.label: Frenzy Barbarian
barb.why: Might aura adds flat physical damage to your Frenzy hits. Since you're dual-wielding and hitting extremely fast, every point of bonus damage is multiplied heavily. This is the #1 merc choice for Frenzy Barbs — nothing else comes close.
barb.alternative: Act II Nightmare — Holy Freeze for crowd control if you're dying a lot in Hell. Slower clear but much safer.

items.name: Infinity (Ber + Mal + Ber + Ist)
items.note: Conviction aura breaks Lightning Immunes for your Zon partner — game-changing

items.name: Insight (Ral + Tir + Tal + Sol)
items.note: Meditation aura = infinite mana for both characters. Budget essential.

items.name: Reaper's Toll
items.note: Decrepify proc — massive damage amp + slow. Great before you afford Infinity.

items.name: Fortitude (El + Sol + Dol + Lo)
items.note: 300% ED, huge merc damage and survivability

items.name: Treachery (Shael + Thul + Lem)
items.note: Fade proc = 60 all res + 15% DR. Best budget option, keeps merc alive.

items.name: Chains of Honor (Dol + Um + Ber + Ist)
items.note: Res + DR + damage. Alternative to Fortitude.

items.name: Andariel's Visage
items.note: IAS + life leech + Str. Socket with Ral for fire res. BiS for merc damage.

items.name: Vampire Gaze
items.note: Dual leech + DR%. Great for keeping merc alive.

items.name: Tal Rasha's Horadric Crest
items.note: Dual leech + all res. Solid budget choice.

zon.label: Java Amazon
zon.recommended: Act II Nightmare — Might (or Holy Freeze)
zon.why: If the Barb's merc already has Infinity, your merc can run Insight for Meditation (infinite mana) or use Might for extra jab damage against Lightning Immunes. Holy Freeze is also excellent — it slows everything, giving you time to throw LF safely.
zon.alternative: Act I Rogue — Faith (Ohm + Jah + Lem + Eld) bow gives Fanaticism aura, boosting your IAS massively. Expensive but extremely powerful for max IAS breakpoints.

items.name: Insight (Ral + Tir + Tal + Sol)
items.note: Meditation aura solves all mana problems. Top priority if Barb merc has Infinity.

items.name: Infinity (Ber + Mal + Ber + Ist)
items.note: If your Barb partner's merc doesn't have it, YOUR merc should. Breaks LI.

items.name: The Reaper's Toll
items.note: Decrepify helps your Barb deal with Physical Immunes that Decrep breaks.

items.name: Treachery (Shael + Thul + Lem)
items.note: Fade proc keeps merc alive. IAS helps Insight/Infinity proc more.

items.name: Fortitude (El + Sol + Dol + Lo)
items.note: Best damage + survivability if you can afford it.

items.name: Andariel's Visage
items.note: IAS + leech. Socket with Ral rune.

items.name: Vampire Gaze
items.note: Keeps merc alive with DR% and leech.

items.name: Guillaume's Face
items.note: 35% Crushing Blow helps merc kill bosses.

necro.label: Manfred the Necromancer
necro.why: Might aura boosts the damage of your entire skeleton army and revives. Since you have 10+ minions all benefiting from the aura, the total damage increase is enormous. The Might aura also stacks with Amplify Damage curse for devastating physical output.
necro.alternative: Act II Nightmare — Holy Freeze for crowd control. Slows enemies so your skeletons survive longer and Corpse Explosion has time to chain. Excellent for Hardcore or undergeared progression.

items.name: Infinity (Ber + Mal + Ber + Ist)
items.note: Conviction aura stacks with Lower Resist curse — together they obliterate lightning resistance for the Zon partner. Game-changing duo synergy.

items.name: Insight (Ral + Tir + Tal + Sol)
items.note: Meditation aura solves mana issues for Corpse Explosion spam. Essential budget option before Infinity.

items.name: Reaper's Toll
items.note: Decrepify proc stacks with your curses. Great transitional weapon but you'll want Infinity for the Zon synergy.

items.name: Treachery (Shael + Thul + Lem)
items.note: Fade proc gives 60 all res + 15% DR. Best budget option and keeps merc alive through Hell.

items.name: Fortitude (El + Sol + Dol + Lo)
items.note: 300% ED and massive defense. Best if merc survivability is already handled.

items.name: Chains of Honor (Dol + Um + Ber + Ist)
items.note: All res + DR + damage. Luxury alternative.

items.name: Andariel's Visage
items.note: IAS + life leech + Str. Socket with Ral for fire res. Best merc damage helm.

items.name: Vampire Gaze
items.note: Dual leech + DR%. Keeps merc alive in dangerous areas.

items.name: Tal Rasha's Horadric Crest
items.note: Dual leech + all res. Solid budget choice.

duo_strategy.title: Merc Coordination
points: Decide who carries Infinity and who carries Insight. You need both — Infinity breaks Lightning Immunes for the Zon, Insight gives infinite mana to both characters.
Best setup: Barb's merc has Infinity (Might + Conviction = insane damage), Zon's merc has Insight (Zon needs the mana more). This way both auras benefit both players.
Budget start: Both mercs use Insight until you find your first Ber rune. The mana sustain is more important than breaking immunities early on.
Keep your mercs alive! They die constantly in Hell if undergeared. Treachery armor is cheap and the Fade proc makes them surprisingly tanky. Prioritize merc survivability over damage.

duo_strategy_affair.title: Merc Coordination
points: Manfred's merc should carry Infinity — Conviction aura stacks with Lower Resist curse for devastating double-dip on lightning resistance reduction. The Zon's Lightning Fury obliterates even former Lightning Immunes.
Zon's merc runs Insight for Meditation aura — Corpse Explosion spam is mana-hungry, and this solves it for both characters.
Budget start: Both mercs use Insight until you find Ber runes. Mana sustain for CE spam matters more than breaking immunities early.
The Necro's skeleton army actually helps keep mercs alive — monsters attack skeletons instead of the merc. Still, Treachery armor is essential for Hell difficulty survivability.

duo_strategy_rainbow.title: Merc Coordination
points: Both the Barb and Manfred want Might mercs — stack two Might auras with the Barb's own Frenzy damage and the skeleton army for overwhelming physical output. One merc carries Infinity only if you need to break Physical Immunes via Amplify Damage + Conviction combo.

Best setup: Barb's merc carries Insight for Meditation aura (Frenzy eats mana fast with BO upkeep), Manfred's merc carries a second Might aura to double-buff the skeleton army. Two Might auras don't stack, but if one merc dies the other keeps the aura rolling.
Budget start: Both mercs use Insight until you can afford better. The mana sustain fuels Battle Orders rebuffing and Corpse Explosion spam — both are critical for this duo's engine to run smoothly.

Merc survivability is a non-issue with this duo. The skeleton army absorbs almost all incoming damage, meaning mercs rarely get hit. Even undergeared mercs survive comfortably — the bone wall protects everyone.
